REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS CAROLYN CHIN, STEPHANIE CHAN, SIMON WONG, CRAIG CHAN AND HOGAN & VEST, INC.'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED. DEMURRER TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF CC 1941.1 IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO CITE ANY AUTHORITY FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT THIS IS A RECOGNIZED STAND-ALONE CAUSE OF ACTION INDEPENDENT AND NOT DUPLICATIVE OF OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION, E.G. VIOLATION OF CC 1942.4 AND NEGLIGENCE. DEMURRER TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF CC 1942.4 BY THE PROPERTY MANAGER DEFENDANTS IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE IN GOOD FAITH FACTS SUPPORTING LIABILITY OF THESE DEFENDANTS AS "LANDLORDS" UNDER THE CODE. MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-01-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS CAROLYN CHIN, STEPHANIE CHAN, SIMON WONG, CRAIG CHAN, HOGAN & VEST, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: GRANTED. Motion is GRANTED without leave to amend as to items (1)-(2), and (11) as listed in the Notice of Motion. The motion is GRANTED with leave to amend as to items (3)-(10) and (12)-(15). The Court does not rule on the sufficiency of any proposed amendments at this time. Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-01-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS CAROLYN CHIN, STEPHANIE CHAN, SIMON WONG, CRAIG CHAN, HOGAN & VEST, INC.'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFFS' SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT.

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: OVERRULED: (1) the 4th cause of action is expressly not alleged against the moving defendants as is stated in the title of the cause of action and confirmed in opposition; (2) the grounds for demurrer to the 8th cause of action appeared on the fact of the FAC barring this demurrer. Both grounds for the demurrer listed in the Notice of Motion could have been raised on a demurrer to the First Amended Complaint and the amendments made to this cause of action did not create the claimed deficiency. Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)

Off Calendar Mar-07-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Edwin Schwartz; Messner Reeves LLP; 949-612-9128; appearing as counsel for defendants Craig S. Chan, Stevanie Diane Chan, Carolyn C. Chin, Hogan & Vest, Inc. and Simon Vic Wong.

Not contested. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS CAROLYN CHIN, STEPHANIE CHAN, SIMON WONG, CRAIG CHAN AND HOGAN & VEST, INC.'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED. Demurrer to the cause of action for violation of CC 1941.1 is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff fails to cite any authority for the proposition that this is a recognized stand-alone cause of action independent and not duplicative of other causes of action, e.g. violation of CC 1942.4 and negligence. Demurrer to the cause of action for violation of CC 1942.4 by the property manager defendants is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in good faith facts supporting liability of these defendants as "landlords" under the code.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
